description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit constructed from weathered wood with a rustic, distressed finish. The structure features five evenly spaced open shelves, providing ample vertical storage space. The sides and back are solid, while the front is completely open, allowing easy access to the shelves. The wood grain and worn paint give it a vintage, reclaimed appearance, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. The shelves are thick and sturdy, capable of supporting various objects such as books, tools, or decorative items. Its simple, utilitarian design makes it versatile for use in garages, workshops, or as a display unit on sidewalks.
description: A tall, rustic wooden shelving unit with five open shelves and a weathered finish. The open front and sturdy construction make it ideal for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid, weathered wooden panel with no visible shelves or openings.
description_view_1: Front view displaying five open shelves and the full height of the shelving unit.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing the solid wooden panel.
description_view_3: Rear angled view, similar to the front, showing the open shelves and the depth of the unit.
